enable bpnumber [bpnumber ...]          Enables the breakpoints given as a space
disable bpnumber [bpnumber ...]          Disables the breakpoints given as a spa
condition bpnumber [condition]          Set a new condition for the breakpoint,
ignore bpnumber [count]          Set the ignore count for the given breakpoint n
cl(ear) [filename:lineno | bpnumber ...]          With a space separated list of
w(here) [count]          Print a stack trace. If count is not specified, print t
exceptions [number]          List or change current exception in an exception ch
u(p) [count]          Move the current frame count (default one) levels up in th

unt(il) [lineno]          Without argument, continue execution until the line wi
s(tep)          Execute the current line, stop at the first possible occasion
n(ext)          Continue execution until the next line in the current function
run [args...]          Restart the debugged python program. If a string is suppl
r(eturn)          Continue execution until the current function returns.
c(ont(inue))          Continue execution, only stop when a breakpoint is encount
j(ump) lineno          Set the next line that will be executed.  Only available
debug code          Enter a recursive debugger that steps through the code
q(uit) | exit          Quit from the debugger. The program being executed is abo
EOF          Handles the receipt of EOF as a command.
a(rgs)          Print the argument list of the current function.
retval          Print the return value for the last return of a function.
p expression          Print the value of the expression.
pp expression          Pretty-print the value of the expression.
l(ist) [first[, last] | .]          List source code for the current file.  With
ll | longlist          List the whole source code for the current function or fr
source expression          Try to get source code for the given object and displ
whatis expression          Print the type of the argument.
display [expression]          Display the value of the expression if it changed,
undisplay [expression]          Do not display the expression any more in the cu
interact          Start an interactive interpreter whose global namespace
alias [name [command]]          Create an alias called 'name' that executes 'com
unalias name          Delete the specified alias.
h(elp)          Without argument, print the list of available commands.
